sessions.mapped_short_description: Healthcare provider BLS with high-quality CPR, AED use, ventilations, choking response, and team communication.
sessions.mapped_what_to_expect: Hands-on CPR and AED practice, ventilation skills, choking response, and scenario-based team communication aligned with current CPR/ECC guidance.

sessions.mapped_short_description: Healthcare provider BLS with high-quality CPR, AED use, ventilations, choking response, and team communication.

sessions.official_course_name: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED
sessions.raw_course_name: AHA Heartsaver® First Aid CPR AED
sessions.course_name: AHA Heartsaver® First Aid CPR AED
sessions.mapped_clean_title: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED
sessions.mapped_short_description: Practical first aid, CPR, and AED training with updated emergency recognition topics.
sessions.mapped_what_to_expect: Hands-on practice plus practical recognition topics such as choking, opioid emergencies and naloxone access, FAST stroke recognition, seizures, asthma inhaler assistance with spacer preference, severe heat illness cooling, safe rewarming, burns, eye injuries, ticks, stings, poison ivy/oak, and pulse oximetry limitations.
